next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task asks 'How much money did we make from the service line follow-up timeline prototype review since beginning of December 2025' and requests number only. I searched invoices for exact service-line text and read all 5 matching files. Filter by issued_on >= 2025-12-01 gives INV-0003 (2025-12-23, line_eur 240), INV-0004 (2026-02-08, line_eur 240), INV-0005 (2026-03-20, line_eur 240). Arithmetic: 240+240+240=720. Completeness check: all search matches were read; older two matches (2025-10-28, 2025-11-25) excluded by date.
next_step.observation: Computed total matching line-item revenue since 2025-12-01 as 720 EUR from three qualifying invoices.
